response.step_by_step_log: 1. The video was reviewed for musical segments. A performance of 'Rivals and Equals' by Mori Calliope was identified. 2. Lyrics for 'Rivals and Equals' were verified via search. 3. The video was split into a performance scene and a subsequent talk/chat scene. 4. Metadata and lyrics were populated for the JSON output.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance by Mori Calliope, beginning with the song 'Rivals and Equals', followed by a post-performance audience chat.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope performs the song 'Rivals and Equals' on stage. The video includes visual text indicating the performance context and the artist's name.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
Base instincts take control
Like primal ways of a warrior
Is it glory you're after, like me?
Underestimated everywhere I turn

[Verse 1]
Taking aim, but it doesn't make a difference at all
I got a million different enemies I cannot recall
You're rocking up to a battle when you know that you'll fall
Hidden motivation, watch it all burn

[Pre-chorus]
I gotta tell you
I never liked you
Now, would I lie to you?
Let me ignite you

[Chorus]
When thunder crashes down
When the world caves under my pressure, there'll be no one to save
Where is your pride, your human will to survive?
Was it just empty words for your grave?
I reach inside this soul
Now all that remains is delusion and decay
'Cause of you, I live this way

[Refrain]
We're not rivals
We're not equals
We're not rivals
You're just confused

[Verse 2]
Lightning never strikes twice in the same spot
So, go ahead and run up on me 'til you get your shot
I see the weapon that you're hiding, come on, ready or not
Another life and you would never give a second thought

[Verse 3]
(Ha, ha) Thinking your pride's different than mine
(Ha) Ticking all your vital signs off
(Ha, ha) But we still gotta protect all our friends from our enemies
(Ha) Wouldn't you agree? Ha

[Bridge]
Forged in fires of hell, God can't betray you
If I'm a fallen angel, what does that make you?
I'm not debasing myself to see the same view
When it's your pride on the line, no one can save you from mine

[Refrain]
We're not rivals
We're not equals
We're not rivals
We're not equals

scenes.description: Mori Calliope talks to the audience after her performance, discussing technical difficulties and interacting with viewers.
